hero.badge: NEW - Version 2.5 - Faster, smarter, more complete
hero.subtitle: Appointments, clients, team, checkouts, stock, and automation in a single platform. Tailored for appointment-based businesses.

target.title: Who is AuraDash for?
target.subtitle: Tailored for any appointment-based business.
target.c1Desc: Salons, barbershops, spas, nail salons, aesthetics.

explorer.title: Everything you need, all in one place
explorer.subtitle: 8 integrated modules to manage and grow your business.

dashboard.title: Main Command Panel & Business Analytics
dashboard.bullet1: Consolidated view of revenue, active appointments, and monthly targets.
dashboard.bullet2: Interactive charts tracking liquid sales and operational velocity.
dashboard.bullet3: Quick access to daily tasks and system-wide critical alerts.

agenda.title: Smart Calendar & Aura AI Copilot Integration
agenda.bullet1: Multi-view schedule by teammate with full drag-and-drop features.
agenda.bullet2: Integrated smart waiting list that automatically fills cancellation spots.
agenda.bullet3: Time-block rules, recurring sessions, and color-coded status states.

clients.title: Robust Client Database & Detailed Profiles
clients.bullet1: Unified CRM with contact details, outstanding balances, and custom notes.
clients.bullet2: Complete visit histories, contracted services, and billing logs.
clients.bullet3: Configurable custom fields tailored to your industry's specific needs.

team.title: Teammates, Shift Rosters & Commission Rules
team.bullet1: Individual configuration of working hours, breaks, and holiday schedules.
team.bullet2: Automated commission calculations for services performed and products sold.
team.bullet3: Role-based access controls (RBAC) to restrict system actions by job role.

finance.title: Daily Till, Money Flows & Secured Closing Ledgers
finance.bullet1: Audited daily cash register openings and hermetic closings.
finance.bullet2: Detailed registration of inflows (cards, cash, transfers) and outflows.
finance.bullet3: Rapid reconciliation panels designed to prevent discrepancies or losses.

inventory.title: Inventory & Stock Control
inventory.bullet1: Batch control (FIFO) and ingredient expiration date logging.
inventory.bullet2: Automatic consumption rules mapping supplies to performed services.
inventory.bullet3: Auto-replenishment orders and minimum stock alerts.

flows.title: Task Automation & Decoupled Workflows
flows.bullet1: Visual canvas to link automatic actions based on system events.
flows.bullet2: Automated WhatsApp business templates and email notification feeds.
flows.bullet3: Dynamic parameterized templates using client and booking variables.

integrations.title: Seamless Connections & Outgoing Webhooks
integrations.bullet1: Native connection to payment providers like Mercado Pago and Stripe.
integrations.bullet2: Two-way synchronization with Google Calendar and Google Sheets.
integrations.bullet3: Developer-ready webhook logs and API tools to connect external ERPs.

settings.title: Custom Field Directory & Global Configuration
settings.bullet1: Visual custom field creator (supporting text, numbers, dropdowns).
settings.bullet2: Business profiles customization, currencies, and time zone details.
settings.bullet3: Fine-tuning of cancellation rules, booking forms, and online portal details.

aiCopilot.title: Aura AI Copilot
aiCopilot.subtitle: Your 24/7 Business Advisor
aiCopilot.desc: Aura AI analyzes your data and delivers alerts, recommendations, and actionable insights for you to make better choices.

bullets.b1Desc: E.g., clients who haven't returned in 45+ days.
bullets.b2Desc: E.g., low stock indicators, drop in revenue, staff absences.
bullets.b3Desc: E.g., which promotions, what to optimize, what to automate.

sandbox.title: How can I help you today?
sandbox.p1: How are sales performing this week?

steps.title: Start in minutes, grow without limits
steps.s1Desc: Register your account and set up your details in simple steps.
steps.s2Desc: Upload your CRM, lists, or inventories directly from Excel.
steps.s3Desc: Begin scheduling appointments and organizing staff slots.
steps.s4Desc: Enable instant WhatsApp notifications, webhooks, and checkouts.
steps.s5Desc: Analyze real-time metrics and watch your business expand.

pricing.title: Simple plans, transparent prices
pricing.subtitle: Choose the model that matches your current business scope.
pricing.footnote: Free 14-day trial • No credit card required • Cancel anytime

comparison.title: Less tools. More results.
comparison.desc: AuraDash replaces multiple expensive tools and gives you everything you need to run and expand your business from a single platform.

ctaFooter.title: Your business can achieve more. We put you in control.
ctaFooter.subtitle: Join over 1,200 businesses that use AuraDash to streamline, audit, and sell more.

howItWorks.title: How does AuraDash work?
howItWorks.subtitle: Explore the power of your new management tool.

step1.title: 360° Main Panel
step1.desc: Unified command center displaying live operational speed, active client tallies, and prompt automation logs.

step2.title: Multi-staff Smart Agenda
step2.desc: Color-coded booking slots with direct integration to client status trackers and custom drag-and-drop fields.

step3.title: CRM & Custom Fields
step3.desc: Centralize customer contact details, histories, debts, and custom fields tailored specifically to your trade.

step4.title: Staff Shifts & Commissions
step4.desc: Manage employee schedules, calculate monthly commission balances automatically, and define custom access roles.

step5.title: Financial Audit Logs
step5.desc: Fully compliant cash drawer closes, audit trails tracking user actor details, and CSV/Excel ERP database exporting.

step6.title: Decoupled Automation Canvas
step6.desc: Build automated triggers: 'On checkout payment approved -> alert staff via WhatsApp and append Google Sheets row'.

step7.title: Payment Checkouts & APIs
step7.desc: Link your sandbox or production Mercado Pago keys, sync Google Calendars, and trace webhooks in real time.

step8.title: Enterprise Configurations
step8.desc: Define global variables, custom metadata parameters, booking form options, and notification behaviors.

liveDemo.title: See AuraDash in Action
liveDemo.desc: Discover how each module works in a guided interactive tour.

testimonial.quote: AuraDash completely changed how we manage our salon. Now we have more clients and fewer no-shows.

financeResponse.message: Sales this week are up 18.5% compared to the monthly average. Excellent performance.

workflowResponse.message: Automatic workflows have notified clients with pending appointments for today via WhatsApp.

agendaResponse.message: Average occupancy for today is at 78%. You have 3 open slots left in the afternoon.
